name: telegram-gmail-bot-termux
description: Telegram reward/task bot with SQLite storage and Termux support

scripts.migrate: node -e "const Database=require('./database-file'); const db=new Database(); console.log('SQLite ready with', db.driver);"

termux.sqlite: Uses built-in node:sqlite on Node 22+, with better-sqlite3/sqlite3 as optional fallback
